name: public-safe-assets
description: Video and sticker storefronts must use only public-safe, non-copyrighted, generated or placeholder media assets. No real film footage, real artist artwork, or copyrighted material may be committed to the repo or referenced by URL.
rules: All media in the repo must be placeholder, generated, or data URIs — no real video/image files of real works
Catalog items must use fictional creator names — no real persons
No external URLs resolving to copyrighted media (e.g. real indie film downloads, real artist artwork)
SVG illustrations and color-block placeholders are allowed
Unsplash/Lorem Picsum and similar generic stock placeholders are allowed if they carry a license
note: Catalog creator names must be visibly fictional — not real filmmaker or artist names. The synthetic note in the brand sandbox disclaimer covers the commercial context, but the assets themselves must be safe for public repos.
